def-declaration.comment: `def NAME` — declaration keyword binding a definition site (tree-sitter `def` @keyword + `(def name:)` @function).

numbers.comment: Integer literals other than the null process `0`.
numbers.name: constant.numeric.stratum

call-name.comment: Macro call (or input channel): identifier immediately before `(` (tree-sitter `(call macro:)` @function.call).
call-name.name: entity.name.function.stratum

named-argument.comment: Named-argument parameter: identifier immediately before `<-` (tree-sitter (named_argument param:) @variable.parameter).
named-argument.name: variable.parameter.stratum

operators.comment: Operators `@` (quote) `*` (drop) `!` (lift) `|` (par) `<-` (named-arg arrow); arrow first so `<` is not read alone (tree-sitter @operator).
operators.name: keyword.operator.stratum

identifiers.comment: Any remaining identifier: a bound / free name (tree-sitter (identifier) @variable).
identifiers.name: variable.other.stratum
